overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a misty forest at dusk. The character ascends a grassy hillside, passes rock formations, and navigates through increasingly dense woodland toward ancient stone ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside with scattered trees overlooking water

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily uphill through tall grass, swords visible on his back, moving toward higher ground

entered.detail: tall brownish-green grass covering the sloping terrain
tall evergreen trees dotting the hillside
body of water visible through the haze in the valley below
group of mushrooms growing on the grassy slope
large boulder formation on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide grassy hillside during a misty dusk. Geralt walks through tall autumn grass with scattered pine trees around him. A distant lake is visible through the haze to the left, and mushrooms dot the ground nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky hillside path along cliff face

events.description: character begins ascending steeper terrain alongside a large rock face

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking uphill along the base of a large rock formation, navigating the incline

entered.detail: tall gray rock wall with rough texture running alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The path narrows as Geralt ascends alongside a massive rock face on the right. The terrain becomes steeper and more enclosed, with the open hillside giving way to a rugged cliffside trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest interior with fallen leaves

events.description: enters dense forest canopy with significantly reduced light
ambient light drops as character moves under dense tree cover

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through a dark forest path covered in fallen autumn leaves, navigating between closely spaced trees

entered.detail: thick cluster of trees with dark trunks forming a dense canopy overhead
carpet of brown and orange leaves covering the forest floor

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a dense forest interior with significantly darker lighting. The ground is covered in fallen autumn leaves, and the trees form a thick canopy overhead. The atmosphere becomes more enclosed and mysterious.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest path with ancient stone ruins

events.description: ancient stone ruins become visible through the trees on the left

agents.ego_description: Geralt approaching stone ruins while walking through the dark forest, maintaining steady pace

entered.detail: ancient weathered stone wall partially covered in moss and vines

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, Geralt approaches ancient stone ruins visible through the trees. The weathered stone walls emerge from the forest on the left, suggesting the presence of old structures hidden within the woods. The atmosphere remains dark and atmospheric as the journey continues past these ruins.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, misty hillside at dusk into the dark, enclosed depths of an ancient forest. It begins with Geralt walking through tall autumn grass and scattered pine trees, with a distant lake shimmering through the haze. As he ascends, the open landscape narrows into a rugged cliffside trail, pressing the camera against a massive rock face. The scene then shifts into a dense forest interior where the lighting darkens and a thick canopy of trees closes in over a ground blanketed in fallen leaves. Finally, the path leads toward weathered stone ruins that emerge from the shadows on the left, deepening the mysterious atmosphere as the journey continues.
